(Source: Bloomberg)

In her new book, The Common Good Economy: A New Compass, she argues for a goal-oriented economy, with targets written into CEOs' contracts. Mazzucato joined 'The Pulse with Francine Lacqua'. title: Iran War: Trump Tries to Stop Israel’s Lebanon Push | The Opening Trade 6/2/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争：特朗普试图阻止以色列对黎巴嫩的进攻开盘交易 6/2/2026
summary:
President Donald Trump is still optimistic the US can reach an interim peace deal with Iran soon, after the Islamic Republic threatened to suspend talks because of Israel’s escalating attacks in Lebanon.

A rally in US stocks is pausing after the artificial-intelligence trade fueled the S&P 500’s longest winning streak in more than a year, with investors gauging the prospects of an end to the war in the Middle East.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank in Early Talks to Back $800 Million Agile Robots Round
title_cn: 软银正在早期洽谈支持 8 亿美元敏捷机器人融资
summary: German industrial robotics startup Agile Robots is in discussions to raise about $800 million in new funding from backers including SoftBank Group Corp., as investors seek out companies deploying artificial intelligence in real-world settings.

title: Amundi Is Diversifying Risk Via Commodity Currencies, Gold
title_cn: Amundi 通过商品货币、黄金分散风险
summary: John O’Toole, head of CIO solutions at Amundi, discusses risk diversification strategies as the war in the Middle East continues and the artificial intelligence trade dominates equity markets. "We've seen opportunities in high-yielding commodity currencies for example," O’Toole tells Bloomberg Television. "We have had exposure to gold, and continue to have exposure to gold," he adds. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix Plans to Double Capacity to Ease Memory Chip Crunch
title_cn: SK 海力士计划将产能翻倍以缓解存储芯片紧缺问题
summary: SK Hynix Inc. plans to double its memory chip capacity over the coming half-decade, a major expansion that should help ease a global shortage of an essential component of AI.

title: Russia Says It Found Foreign Spyware on Top Officials’ Phones
title_cn: 俄罗斯称在高级官员的手机上发现外国间谍软件
summary: Russia’s Federal Security Service said it uncovered a large-scale operation by foreign intelligence agencies to implant spyware on senior officials’ mobile phones.

title: Tencent Jumps After Report It’s Set to Launch WeChat AI Agent
title_cn: 有报道称腾讯将推出微信人工智能代理，股价大涨
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. shares advanced the most since late 2022 after a report it’s testing a prototype AI agent fueled optimism about the company’s artificial intelligence efforts.

title: MediaTek Pledges Hiring Spree to Boost Push Into New AI Spheres

summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. shares soared in premarket trading after the company gave an outlook for annual sales that topped estimates, citing massive growth in AI-fueled demand for its servers and networking.

title: Advantech's Tsai on Nvidia Collaboration, AI Strategy

summary: Advantech COO and President of the Intelligent Systems Sector Linda Tsai discusses the company's collaboration with Nvidia to power next-generation AI solutions. She also lays out the company's strategic vision behind integrating AI across products and services. Linda speaks with Stephen Engle from the sidelines of 'Computex 2026' in Taipei. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: STMicro Nearly Doubles Outlook for 2026 Data Center Revenue
title_cn: STMicro 将 2026 年数据中心收入预期提高近一倍
summary: STMicroelectronics NV nearly doubled its forecast for revenue from its data centers business to $1 billion this year, fueled by booming demand for artificial intelligence infrastructure.

summary: Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson, Tom Mackenzie and Mark Cudmore break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel's Lip-Bu Tan on Agentic AI & Partner Networks
title_cn: 英特尔的 Lip-Bu Tan 谈 Agentic AI 和合作伙伴网络
summary: Intel's Lip-Bu Tan highlights why cross-sector partnerships are critical to sustaining a vibrant tech ecosystem. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Haas Says Arm May Hit $15 Billion AI Chip Revenue Goal Early
title_cn: Haas 表示 Arm 可能提前实现 150 亿美元 AI 芯片收入目标
summary: Arm Holdings Plc Chief Executive Officer Rene Haas says the firm may achieve its target of $15 billion in sales of its own-branded chips earlier than anticipated, reflecting stronger-than-projected demand from the AI boom. Haas speaks to Bloomberg's Stephen Engle on the sidelines of the Computex trade show in Taipei. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Arm May Hit $15 Billion AI Chip Revenue Goal Early, CEO Says
title_cn: Arm CEO 表示可能提前实现 150 亿美元 AI 芯片收入目标
summary: Arm Holdings Plc may achieve its target of $15 billion in sales of its own chips earlier than anticipated, its chief executive officer said, reflecting stronger-than-projected demand from the AI boom.

title: China’s BrainCo Sees Bionic Hand Sales Boom From Robot Makers
title_cn: 中国BrainCo看到机器人制造商的仿生手销售繁荣
summary: Chinese neurotechnology startup and prosthetics developer BrainCo expects sales of its robotic hands to surge this year as demand grows from the country’s fast-expanding humanoid robotics industry.

title: Twinco Capital Raises $190 Million for Supply-Chain Financing
title_cn: Twinco Capital 筹集 1.9 亿美元用于供应链融资
summary: European fintech firm Twinco Capital has raised a total of €165 million ($190 million) in a series B equity round and a securitization fund.

title: At Least 18 Killed in Russian Missile Attack on Ukraine
title_cn: 俄罗斯导弹袭击乌克兰 至少18人死亡
summary: Russia carried out a large-scale drone and missile strike on Ukraine, killing at least 18 people and injuring more than a hundred.

title: Magyar Hopes for Deal With Ukraine This Week to Open EU Talks
title_cn: 马扎尔希望本周与乌克兰达成协议以开启欧盟谈判
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar said he hoped to close “technical” talks with Kyiv this week over a minority rights issue that is holding up the start of Ukraine’s formal negotiations to join the European Union.

title: What You Need to Know About California's Primary Elections
title_cn: 关于加州初选您需要了解什么
summary: The primary for California governor is underway, and it’s a nail-biter. Eliyahu Kamisher breaks down what you need to know about the election. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Reality TV Star, Ex-Fox News Host Emerge as Serious GOP Contenders in California Primaries
title_cn: 真人秀明星、前福克斯新闻主持人成为加州初选共和党的有力竞争者
summary: Steve Hilton paced the stage at a brewery outside San Francisco with a simple message: California is broken and only an outsider can fix it.

title: Ghana Plans SOE Reforms, Forson Says
title_cn: 福森表示，加纳计划进行国有企业改革
summary: Ghana Finance Minister Cassiel Ato Forson said the government plans reforms of state-owned enterprises. He spoke to Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja in London. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump, Facing Setbacks and Opposition, Picks His Battles
title_cn: 面对挫折和反对，特朗普选择了战斗
summary: On Iran, a “weaponization” fund and more, the president is prioritizing on issues big and small

title: Turkish Foreign Minister Expects Trump to Attend NATO Summit
title_cn: 土耳其外长期待特朗普出席北约峰会
summary: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan tells Bloomberg that he expects US President Donald Trump to attend the NATO summit in Ankara next month. “As far as we know he's going to attend,” Fidan says during an interview with Haslinda Amin in Singapore. He also discusses the US-Iran war and the prospects for a peace agreement. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Swiss 10-Million Cap Damage Can’t Be Easily Dodged, Lombard Says
title_cn: 隆巴德表示，瑞士 1000 万上限的损失无法轻易避免
summary: The strict limits Switzerland must implement in a proposal to cap its population at 10 million would make economic fallout hard to avoid, according to Lombard Odier.

title: Serbia's Vucic on China Relationship, EU Accession
title_cn: 塞尔维亚武契奇谈中国关系和入盟
summary: Serbian President Aleksandar Vucic discusses China relations and the Balkan nation's accession negotiations with the European Union. He speaks to Bloomberg's Oliver Crook. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Turkey Foreign Minister on Iran, NATO
title_cn: 土耳其外长谈伊朗和北约问题
summary: Turkey Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said President Donald Trump is expected to attend the NATO summit in Ankara in July. In a Bloomberg TV exclusive interview, Fidan also commented on his call with Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi, saying it will be "extremely difficult" for ceasefire talks to continue after Israel's attack on Hezbollah in Lebanon. He spoke to Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin during a visit to Singapore for a series of high-level diplomatic meetings. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Merz Says Germany’s Nazi Past Bars Cooperation With Far Right
title_cn: 默茨称德国纳粹过去禁止与极右翼合作
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz evoked Germany’s Nazi past to warn against a surge in far-right politics as he vowed to carry on with this coalition government in the face of plummeting public support.

title: Senate Impasse Deepens Political Uncertainty in Philippines
title_cn: 参议院僵局加剧菲律宾政治不确定性
summary: The Philippine Senate was paralyzed for a second day on Tuesday as rival groups hit an impasse, heightening political uncertainty in the chamber that’s tasked to hold Vice President Sara Duterte’s impeachment trial.

title: Romanian Top Military Officer Faces Probe Over Alleged Graft
title_cn: 罗马尼亚高级军官因涉嫌腐败面临调查
summary: Romania’s anti-corruption prosecutors have opened an investigation into the country’s highest-ranking military officer over alleged complicity in a case linked to appointments within the armed forces.

title: US Lowers Tariffs to Boost Investment in Industrial Economy
title_cn: 美国降低关税促进工业经济投资
summary: The White House said it will reduce tariffs on farm and construction equipment such as harvesters and forklifts, in an effort to boost investment in the industrial economy through next year.

title: Rubio Goes to Capitol Hill, Where Questions on Iran and Ebola Await
title_cn: 卢比奥前往国会山，伊朗和埃博拉问题等待解决
summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is scheduled to begin lengthy testimony before Congress as the war in Iran and the latest Ebola outbreak have been thrust to the forefront of American foreign policy concerns.

title: Putin’s Long War in Ukraine Is Running Into Money Troubles
title_cn: 普京在乌克兰的长期战争遇到了资金问题
summary: Finance officials are telling the Russian leader that growth is grinding almost to a halt.

title: Trump Expected to Attend NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey’s Fidan Says
title_cn: 土耳其菲丹表示，特朗普预计将出席在安卡拉举行的北约峰会
summary: Turkey expects President Donald Trump to attend the NATO summit in Ankara next month, where alliance members will face pressure to show progress on a longstanding US demand to ramp up defense spending.

title: Denmark’s Leader Wins Third Term After Record-Long Talks
title_cn: 丹麦领导人在创纪录的长时间会谈后赢得第三个任期
summary: Denmark’s Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen will remain in power for a third term to oversee fractured relations with the US after a breakthrough in record-long talks to form a coalition.

title: Venezuela Loses Badly Needed Doctors Because of Trump’s Cuba Crackdown
title_cn: 由于特朗普对古巴的镇压，委内瑞拉失去了急需的医生
summary: The US push to choke off revenue flowing into Havana’s coffers is leaving countless people in poorer parts of Caracas and beyond without access to care.

title: Venezuela enfrenta un vacío en la salud tras la salida de personal médico cubano
title_cn: 古巴医务人员离开后委内瑞拉面临卫生真空
summary: La campaña de EE.UU. para cortar los ingresos que llegan a las arcas de La Habana está dejando a innumerables personas de los barrios más pobres de Caracas y de otras zonas sin acceso a la atención sanitaria.

title: Trump Tries to Stop Israel’s Lebanon Push Derailing an Iran Deal
title_cn: 特朗普试图阻止以色列对黎巴嫩的推动破坏伊朗协议
summary: President Donald Trump is still optimistic the US can reach an interim peace deal with Iran soon, after the Islamic Republic threatened to suspend talks because of Israel’s escalating attacks in Lebanon.

title: Why Turkey’s Opposition Is Struggling to Break Erdogan’s Grip
title_cn: 为什么土耳其反对派正在努力打破埃尔多安的控制
summary: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan has long relied on divide-and-rule tactics to fend off political challengers. The approach appears to have worked remarkably well of late.

title: Burnham Says He Won’t Call Early Election If He Replaces Starmer
title_cn: 伯纳姆表示，如果他取代斯塔默，他不会提前大选
summary: Would-be UK prime minister Andy Burnham has ruled out a snap general election if he replaces Keir Starmer this summer, in an effort to tamp down speculation that Britain could be heading for an early vote.

title: AI’s Invasion of Politics Will Make for Messy Midterms
title_cn: 人工智能对政治的入侵将使中期选举变得混乱
summary: A deluge of ads is reshaping campaigns — and testing voters’ trust.

title: EU Lawmakers Clear US Trade Deal for Final Approval
title_cn: 欧盟立法者批准美国贸易协议以供最终批准
summary: European Union lawmakers gave preliminary approval to a US trade deal, clearing a path for final ratification before President Donald Trump’s threatened deadline to impose new tariffs.

title: Senegal’s Faye Names Cabinet Excluding Pastef as Political Rift Widens
title_cn: 塞内加尔政治裂痕扩大，费耶提名不包括帕斯特夫的内阁
summary: Senegalese President Bassirou Diomaye Faye appointed a new cabinet that his estranged ally Ousmane Sonko vowed to boycott, deepening a political rift in the West African country as it navigates a debt crisis.

title: Kenya Ordered to Disclose Details of Ebola Center Deal With US
title_cn: 肯尼亚被要求披露与美国的埃博拉中心协议细节
summary: A Kenyan high court instructed the authorities to disclose details of an agreement with the US government to establish an Ebola quarantine facility in the East African nation.

title: Trump Aims to Keep Iran Peace Talks Alive
title_cn: 特朗普旨在保持伊朗和平谈判的活力
summary: President Donald Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu offered differing accounts of a call about the fighting in Lebanon, as the US struggled to get efforts toward an Iran peace deal back on track. The mismatched statements were the latest example of confusing signals on progress to end a war. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cambodia Seeks Rare UN Ruling in $300 Billion Thai Energy Spat
title_cn: 柬埔寨就价值 3000 亿美元的泰国能源争端寻求联合国罕见裁决
summary: Cambodia has initiated rare United Nations compulsory conciliation proceedings against Thailand to resolve a decades-long maritime border dispute, after talks collapsed over an area both countries say holds $300 billion worth of oil and gas.
